title: Sign in and reach the protected dashboard
description: An authenticated admin can log in through the auth page and access the protected dashboard without being blocked.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Click the link to the dashboard
Verify the protected dashboard is displayed
Verify admin controls are available

title: Submit an inquiry from the contact form
description: Verify a visitor can submit a valid contact inquiry and receive a success confirmation after submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email
Fill in the message field with a valid inquiry message
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the form submission completes

title: Navigate the home page sections and submit an inquiry
description: A prospective client can move through the main home page sections and submit the contact form, ending with a visible confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to the services section
Click the link to the portfolio section
Click the link to the testimonials section
Click the link to the FAQ section
Click the link to the contact section
Fill in the name field with a valid name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the message field with a valid inquiry
Submit the contact form
Verify a confirmation message is visible
Verify the inquiry is no longer shown as unsent

title: Block unauthenticated dashboard access
description: A visitor who is not signed in cannot open the protected dashboard and is redirected or blocked from seeing admin content.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify access to the protected area is blocked
Verify the dashboard content is not visible

title: Navigate the landing page sections
description: Verify a visitor can move through the main landing page sections and reach the contact area from the home page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to the services section
Click the navigation link to the portfolio section
Click the navigation link to the testimonials section
Click the navigation link to the FAQ section
Click the navigation link to the contact section
Verify the contact section is displayed
Verify the landing page sections are accessible

title: Open the portfolio gallery from the home page
description: A visitor can use the home page to reach the portfolio gallery and see portfolio work displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to the portfolio page
Verify portfolio projects are displayed

title: Filter portfolio projects by category
description: A visitor can filter the works gallery by category and see only matching projects displayed.

steps.description: Navigate to /works
Select a portfolio category filter
Verify matching portfolio projects are displayed
Verify non-matching projects are hidden

title: View bookings in the dashboard
description: This verifies that an authenticated staff user can open the protected dashboard and see the list of client bookings.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the bookings section in the dashboard sidebar
Verify the bookings list is displayed

title: Browse portfolio projects by category
description: Verify a visitor can filter the portfolio gallery to see only projects in a chosen category.

steps.description: Navigate to /works
Select a valid portfolio category filter
Verify the gallery updates to show matching projects
Verify unrelated projects are hidden

title: Review bookings and update a booking status
description: An authenticated staff member can open bookings in the dashboard, change a booking status, and see the updated status persist in the list.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Click the link to the dashboard
Open the bookings view
Select a different booking status for a booking
Save the booking update
Verify the updated booking status is visible
Verify the bookings list remains displayed

title: Update a booking status
description: This verifies that an authenticated staff user can change a booking status and see the updated state reflected in the dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the bookings section in the dashboard sidebar
Change a booking status
Save the booking update
Verify the booking status update is reflected
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Add and arrange project blocks in the builder
description: An authenticated admin can drag blocks into the project canvas, reorder them, and see the edited builder state reflected on screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Click the link to the dashboard
Drag a content block from the sidebar into the canvas
Reorder a block within the canvas
Edit a block property
Verify the builder reflects the added and reordered blocks
Verify the edited block property is visible

title: Open the contact page and see the inquiry form
description: A visitor can open the contact page and access the inquiry form needed to contact the studio.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Verify the contact form is displayed

title: See a no-results state in the portfolio filter
description: Verify a visitor sees an empty state when selecting a portfolio category with no matching projects.

steps.description: Navigate to /works
Select a category with no matching projects
Verify a no-results state is displayed
Verify the gallery does not show matching projects

title: Open the about page
description: A visitor can open the about page and see studio background information.

steps.description: Navigate to /about
Verify about page content is displayed

title: Handle an empty portfolio filter result
description: A visitor applying a category with no matches sees an empty state instead of a broken gallery.

steps.description: Navigate to /works
Select a portfolio category filter with no matches
Verify an empty state message is visible
Verify portfolio projects are not displayed

title: Keep booking unchanged when status update is invalid
description: This verifies that an authenticated staff user is prevented from saving an invalid booking change and the original booking remains unchanged.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in {{LOGIN_USER}} into the email field
Fill in {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}} into the password field
Submit the login form
Click the bookings section in the dashboard sidebar
Attempt to change a booking status to an invalid value
Save the booking update
Verify a booking status validation error is visible
Verify the booking remains unchanged

title: Show validation errors for incomplete contact form submission
description: Verify a visitor sees form validation feedback when submitting the contact form without required information.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Submit the contact form without entering required details
Verify validation errors are visible
Verify the form remains available for correction

title: Show the builder error state when required dashboard data is missing
description: An authenticated admin opening the dashboard with missing required builder data sees a graceful error state instead of a broken builder.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the authentication form
Click the link to the dashboard
Verify a builder error state is visible
Verify the builder remains usable only for non-dependent dashboard content

title: Ignore an invalid section anchor on the home page
description: Verify a visitor stays on the landing page when trying to open a missing section anchor and the page content does not change unexpectedly.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for an invalid section anchor
Verify the landing page remains visible
Verify no new section content is displayed

title: Reject invalid login credentials
description: A visitor using invalid credentials sees a login failure message and does not gain access.

steps.description: Navigate to /auth
Fill in the email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the password field with an invalid password
Submit the authentication form
Verify a login failure message is visible
Verify protected dashboard content is not visible
